description: Letter from Abū Sahl Levi (d. 1211) and his family to his son, probably Moshe b. Levi ha-Levi (d. 1212), in Qalyūb. Reporting on the coming and going of various letters and goods, and with holiday greetings to Abū l-Faraj, Khalaf, and his son. At the bottom of verso Moshe has added a few cryptic phrases in Hebrew and Judaeo-Arabic in his own handwriting (related to poems/piyyuṭim?). (Information in part from CUDL.) ASE
tags: Abu Sahl Levi, Moshe b. Levi ha-Levi
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
